title: The Mystery Helper
synopsis: Hugo is determined to solve the mystery of who keeps secretly helping him with his inventions in the treetop village. Through careful observation and stubborn investigation, he discovers the truth about his mysterious helper.

pages.text: My hammer is exactly where I need it. This is suspicious. Yesterday I left my hammer on the roof of Mrs. Oakley's treehouse. Now it sits on my workbench, perfectly clean and organized. Someone moved my hammer. This is a serious crime. I live in a village of treehouses connected by rope bridges that creak and sway when the morning wind blows through the oak leaves. The bridges smell like rope and tree sap. Every morning I build something important. Today I planned to build a bird feeder that spins. But first, I must investigate this hammer situation.

illustration.description: Hugo, a boy with straight light blonde hair, fair skin, and light blue eyes, stands at a wooden workbench inside a cozy treehouse. He holds a hammer and stares at it with intense concentration and suspicion. Tools are neatly organized around him. Through the round window, rope bridges and other treehouses are visible among green leaves. The illustration uses exaggerated cartoon style with squash and stretch, oversized expressions, candy bright colors, bouncy dynamic poses, slapstick energy, and rubber hose animation feel.
illustration.alt: Hugo examining his mysteriously clean hammer at his workbench

pages.text: I examine the hammer with my magnifying glass. No fingerprints. No mud. No splinters. This hammer is too perfect. Real hammers have character. Real hammers have dirt and scratches from honest work. I check my notebook where I write down important clues. Yesterday's entry says: 'Left hammer on Mrs. Oakley's roof. Hammer was covered in tree sap and sawdust.' Today's entry will say: 'Someone cleaned my hammer and returned it. This person is clearly up to something.' I put on my detective hat, which is actually just my regular hat, but now it serves a detective purpose.

illustration.description: Close-up of Hugo, a boy with straight light blonde hair, fair skin, and light blue eyes, peering through a large magnifying glass at his hammer. His eye appears enormous through the lens. He wears a simple cap and has an extremely serious, analytical expression. His workbench is cluttered with detective tools and a notebook. The illustration uses exaggerated cartoon style with squash and stretch, oversized expressions, candy bright colors, bouncy dynamic poses, slapstick energy, and rubber hose animation feel.
illustration.alt: Hugo investigating his hammer with a magnifying glass

pages.text: At lunch time, I discover my bird feeder project is half finished. This is extremely suspicious. I left two pieces of wood and some screws this morning. Now there are four pieces, perfectly measured and cut. The cuts are too straight. Too professional. I could never make cuts this perfect. Someone is definitely helping me, and I do not like it. Help is only good when you ask for it. Secret help is basically lying. I examine the wood pieces. They smell like fresh sawdust and patience. Only someone with very good measuring skills could cut wood this precisely.

illustration.description: Hugo, a boy with straight light blonde hair, fair skin, and light blue eyes, crouches next to partially assembled bird feeder parts on his treehouse deck. He holds up a perfectly cut wooden piece, studying it with intense suspicion. Measuring tools and wood shavings are scattered around. Rope bridges and leafy branches frame the scene. The illustration uses exaggerated cartoon style with squash and stretch, oversized expressions, candy bright colors, bouncy dynamic poses, slapstick energy, and rubber hose animation feel.
illustration.alt: Hugo examining perfectly cut wood pieces for his bird feeder

pages.text: I set up a trap. If someone is secretly helping me, they will return. I arrange my tools in a specific pattern and take a photograph with my camera. Then I hide behind Mrs. Oakley's treehouse and wait. The rope bridge creaks in the afternoon breeze. Birds chirp in the branches above. A squirrel runs across the bridge carrying an acorn. Everything seems normal. Too normal. I watch my workbench through my binoculars. The binoculars make everything look bigger and more suspicious. Waiting is harder than building. Building uses your hands. Waiting only uses your patience, and my patience is not very good at its job.

illustration.description: Hugo, a boy with straight light blonde hair, fair skin, and light blue eyes, hides behind a large tree trunk holding oversized binoculars to his eyes. The binoculars are comically large compared to his head. He peers intensely at his treehouse workbench in the distance. A curious squirrel sits on a branch above him. Dappled sunlight filters through leaves. The illustration uses exaggerated cartoon style with squash and stretch, oversized expressions, candy bright colors, bouncy dynamic poses, slapstick energy, and rubber hose animation feel.
illustration.alt: Hugo hiding behind a tree with large binoculars, watching his workbench

pages.text: A beaver waddles across the rope bridge toward my treehouse. This beaver wears tiny work goggles and carries a small toolbox in his mouth. He approaches my workbench with the confidence of someone who knows exactly what they are doing. The beaver picks up a screwdriver with his teeth and begins attaching the bird feeder pieces together. His technique is flawless. His measurements are perfect. This beaver is clearly a professional. I have found my mystery helper, and he is a beaver with excellent carpentry skills.

illustration.description: A beaver wearing tiny work goggles waddles across a rope bridge carrying a small toolbox in his mouth. In the background, Hugo (a boy with straight light blonde hair, fair skin, and light blue eyes) watches from behind binoculars, his mouth hanging open in shock. The beaver looks completely serious and professional. The treehouse workbench is visible ahead. The illustration uses exaggerated cartoon style with squash and stretch, oversized expressions, candy bright colors, bouncy dynamic poses, slapstick energy, and rubber hose animation feel.
illustration.alt: A professional beaver with goggles crossing the bridge while Hugo watches in amazement

pages.text: I approach the beaver carefully. 'Excuse me,' I say politely. 'You have been helping me with my projects.' The beaver looks up and nods once, very seriously. 'Why?' I ask. The beaver points to a sign on his toolbox that reads: 'PROFESSIONAL HELPER - QUALITY WORK GUARANTEED.' 'I see,' I say. 'But I did not hire you.' The beaver shrugs and continues working. He attaches the final screw and steps back to admire the completed bird feeder. It is the most beautiful bird feeder I have ever seen. It spins perfectly in the evening breeze. 'Thank you,' I say. The beaver tips his goggles politely and waddles away into the sunset.

illustration.description: Hugo, a boy with straight light blonde hair, fair skin, and light blue eyes, stands next to the beaver who points proudly at his tiny toolbox with a sign reading 'PROFESSIONAL HELPER.' The completed spinning bird feeder hangs between them, turning gently in the breeze. Both Hugo and the beaver have serious, professional expressions. Golden sunset light filters through the tree leaves around the treehouse. The illustration uses exaggerated cartoon style with squash and stretch, oversized expressions, candy bright colors, bouncy dynamic poses, slapstick energy, and rubber hose animation feel.
illustration.alt: Hugo and the professional beaver admiring the completed spinning bird feeder at sunset

coverPrompt.description: Hugo, a boy with straight light blonde hair, fair skin, and light blue eyes, stands on a rope bridge between treehouses, holding a magnifying glass and looking very serious. Tree branches sway around him with colorful leaves. Various woodland animals peek out from behind trees and treehouse windows. The illustration has exaggerated cartoon style with squash and stretch animation, oversized expressions, candy bright colors, bouncy dynamic poses, slapstick energy, and rubber hose animation feel.
coverPrompt.alt: Hugo investigating on a rope bridge between treehouses

questions.question: What does Hugo find suspicious about his hammer?
choices: It is too clean and perfectly organized
It is missing from his workbench
It is broken and needs repair
questions.explanation: Hugo is suspicious because his hammer was cleaned and organized when he left it dirty on Mrs. Oakley's roof.

questions.question: What is Hugo trying to build?
questions.explanation: Hugo planned to build a spinning bird feeder, and someone kept helping him with the project.

questions.question: How does Hugo try to catch the mystery helper?
choices: He sets up a trap and watches through binoculars
He asks his neighbors for help
questions.explanation: Hugo arranges his tools in a pattern, takes a photo, then hides and watches his workbench with binoculars.

questions.question: Who is the mystery helper?
questions.explanation: The mystery helper is revealed to be a professional beaver wearing tiny work goggles and carrying a toolbox.

questions.question: What does the beaver's toolbox sign say?
questions.explanation: The beaver's toolbox has a sign that reads 'PROFESSIONAL HELPER - QUALITY WORK GUARANTEED.'
